name: Honey Curried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine in a casserole dish at 225 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Stir in the honey, prepared mustard, salt, and curry powder.
3. Roll each piece of chicken in the mixture and arrange them in a single layer in the baking dish.
4. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour or until fork-tender.
